description_long: This is a modern rectangular bathroom sink unit featuring a light wood-finished cabinet with clean, minimalist lines. The sink basin is an oval vessel style, white in color, and sits atop the wooden cabinet, with a matte black wall-mounted faucet and controls above it. The front of the cabinet appears to have a large drawer, while the rear view reveals an open back, likely for plumbing access. The wood grain is visible, giving the unit a natural and contemporary look. The faucet and drain are both positioned at the rear of the basin, and the overall design is compact, suitable for urban bathrooms or public washrooms. The materials suggest durability and easy maintenance, with a hard, smooth finish on both the wood and ceramic surfaces.
description: A modern vessel sink with a white oval basin atop a light wood cabinet, featuring a matte black wall-mounted faucet and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the wood cabinet and the protruding vessel basin with the wall-mounted faucet visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide wood cabinet, the oval vessel basin, and the wall-mounted faucet and controls above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the cabinet's depth and the vessel basin's profile.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the open back of the cabinet, likely for plumbing, and the vessel basin with faucet and controls above.
